name: The Tangled Briar
description:
Suit Shields (Con)

Alignment lawful evil

The Tangled Briar signifies the return of ancient triumphs. As long as you have The Tangled Briar invested, you gain as a bonus feat. If you already possess this feat, increase your maximum Hit Points by twice your level.

Activate 2 envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You raise the card up above your head and invoke the thorns and briars of the tangled parts of the world; you cast . The rank of the spell is half your level, rounded down (minimum 6th level). The brambles within this particular wall of thorns are treated as greater difficult terrain.
